name: Chocolate Rum Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook over low heat the sugar and rum until dissolved, but not brown.
2. In a double boiler, melt the sweet chocolate.
3. After melting the chocolate, stir in the 3 tablespoons of whipping cream.
4. Add the syrup to the melted chocolate and stir until smooth.
5. When the mixture is cool, fold it into the beaten egg whites. The egg whites should be stiffly beaten before folding.
6. Gently fold all ingredients into the whipped cream.
7. Chill in sherbet glasses for 2-3 hours prior to serving.
